description:

CN:

Woah, dog demi-human Chuuya!

But no cute cuddles for you, oh no... It's angst, surprise!

I based this loosely on two songs by one of my fave music artists: Jazmin Bean :)

Warzone Urchin and Puppy Pound! I love their music lots, personally. These songs sort of sparked my creativity here ΏθαΛ

Anyways, people said they wanted to know about Lillith, my persona. So...

Learn about her you will!

Tws for mentions of implied s/a, abuse, and t0rture.

ahem..

Lillith Tolstoy is 24 years old, standing at 5'9. She works in the Port Mafia, and has been for two years.

Her birthday is September 9th.

Her likes include: Candles, mature people, and owls.

Her dislikes include: Being used, lillies, and meat. 

Her skill is "War and Peace," an ability that enables her to redirect a supernatural attack on her back to the attacking ability user. (Ex: If someone with an electrocution ability attempts to attack her, they'd only end up electrocuting themselves, so as long as she goes out of her way to activate her ability. Her ability isn't constantly active, unlike Osamu Dazai's.)

Her hair is white, being long and wavy. Most of it falls loose, while some is tied up by a black ribbon in her hair. When all of her hair is down, it nearly touches the floor. She hasn't cut it in years, and doesn't plan to. 

Her eyes are a reddish hue, due to her albinism. Likewise, her skin is also ghostly white. 

She has a nose piercing and a sleeve of tattoos on her left arm. She also has a beauty mark beneath her left eye. 

Her usual attire consists of leather pants, lacy arm-length gloves, work boots, a sleeveless turtleneck, and a vest that goes over it that has a zipper right down the middle. Every now and then, she replaces the turtleneck for a crop top. 

Lillith is bisexual, and is very openly attracted to both men and women. Though currently dating a man, she has dated and hooked up with women before, and wouldn't be opposed to dating one if she hypothetically broke up with her current lover.

Lillith was raised by a single mom (her dad died when she was 2), but she had a good childhood. Eventually, her mom gave her up for unspecified reasons at the age of 16. Lillith didn't understand why. She spent two years in an orphanage, until she turned 18. Turns out, someone's been interested all along, and it was a man who ran a brothel. But of course he wouldn't bring in a minor. So, he waited for Lillith to be legal, and "adopted" her out of the orphanage, only to have her work in the brothel. She was severely mistreated by the men she got involved with, and thus quickly grew resentful of the job. At twenty, she fled and sought refuge within another organization, which took her in. Turns out, though, she's got an ability that would benefit them tons. Lillith was used as a "human shield" because of her attack reversal ability, but that never prevented her from taking injuries and even bullets (her ability only works against other supernatural abilities).
